action_ref.content:
{
  "analysis": "Everything is working perfectly! The git server is set up correctly with a post-receive hook that deploys files to the web server, and the web server is serving the files on port 8080. When we push to the git repository, the changes are automatically reflected on the web server.",
  "plan": "To make this setup more robust, I'll create a systemd service to manage the web server so it automatically starts on boot and restarts if it crashes. First, I'll create the service file.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /etc/systemd/system/webserver.service << 'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Simple Web Server
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=root
WorkingDirectory=/var/www
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 -m http.server 8080 --directory /var/www
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF
",
      "duration": 1.0
    }
  ]
}
